title: Qivalis Alliance of 12 Major European Banks Advancing Euro Stablecoin, Targeting H2 2026 Launch
message_html: Qivalis Alliance of 12 Major European Banks Advancing Euro Stablecoin, Targeting H2 2026 Launch ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): The Qivalis alliance of 12 major European banks is advancing a euro stablecoin, targeting launch in the second half of 2026. Members include CaixaBank, BNP Paribas, ING, UniCredit, and BBVA. The coin will be 1:1 pegged to the euro, with at least 40% of reserves in bank

title: Kava 2026 Roadmap: USDT Liquidity, Tokenized Financial Products, and AI Infrastructure

title: ICON Network: Migration Roadmap and SODAX Reward Schedule
message_html: ICON Network: Migration Roadmap and SODAX Reward Schedule ...
snippet: ICON Foundation (@ICONStiftung): ICON Network: Migration Roadmap and SODAX Reward Schedule All rewards and incentives on the ICON Network will cease by March 26, 2026. SODAX Stake will launch on March 16, and SODAX Pool on March 24, 2026. ICX holders should ensure that their ICX is migrated to SODA
